templates.label: Any focus areas?
templates.copy: Any areas you want me to focus on?

templates.label: Thank you
templates.copy: Thanks for choosing PureTask! I just finished up — let me know if there's anything you'd like adjusted.

templates.label: Would you like to reschedule?
templates.copy: Hi! Would you like to reschedule this cleaning? If so, tell me a better day/time and I'll confirm right away.

templates.label: Request a review
templates.copy: If you were happy with the cleaning, would you mind leaving a quick review? It really helps me get booked more often. Thank you!

templates.label: Request a tip
templates.copy: If you feel I did a great job, tips are always appreciated — but never expected. Thank you for your support!
